reviews.title: Turns off when I use the Aux
reviews.text: These don’t connect to a number of my Bluetooth devices. Basically only phones and tablets work with them. Even in the directions it says they shut off….then why add it??? Even after they shut off, I tried to see if they worked anyway since the directions say that. They don’t. If they only connect to phones & tablets through Bluetooth only, it needs to say that.

reviews.title: Uncomfortable
reviews.text: Got these for testing. They did break after a couple of years of use. They are also very uncomfortable. The headband is not a great design. However they do what they are intended to do.

reviews.title: Work well for online meetings
reviews.text: My school district is purchasing a set of 50 for my yearbook classroom where my science students spend a fair amount of time.  This one was purchased to try out at home.  Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

reviews.title: Look at the shape of the earphones
reviews.text: The shape of the earphones is odd.  They don't cover thd entire ear which makes the a littke uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Head set good for Zoom
reviews.text: we like them.  However we have to separate for Zoom or we get override.  Otherwise it is good.

reviews.title: Gets the job done!
reviews.text: Decent headphone/Mic combo. Not the best (no volume control), but it's great for the price! I use it for my podcast and for gaming/twitch streaming, and it works out fine!

reviews.text: Can’t get it off the iPod case. Even with product support I feel like $$ AirPod lid will snap off because of this case. Also no hole in back to allow access to AirPod button. Even more reason not to buy and put on iPods. If I ever get it off ill update the outcome. For now, I’ll try to deal with it.

title: PALOVUE Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones, Wireless Earphones CVC8.0 Noise Cancelling Earbuds with Touch Control and 4 Mic for Clearer Call, Deep Bass Stereo in-Ear Headphones Qualcomm CSR Chip
features: [Qualcomm CSR & BLUETOOTH 5.0] The latest Bluetooth 5.0 and Qualcomm chipset QCC3020 technology provides a fast, stable and crystal clear connection, aptX HD sound quality transmission, and longer battery life & range (up to 32.8 feet)

[Dual Mic & CVC 8.0 Algorithm] CVC 8.0 Noise Cancelling technology effectively reduce the external noise and enjoy the calling immersive sound everywhere and anytime with outstanding clarity even in a loud environment

[Ergonomic Design & 5 Sizes Ear-tips] Designed with human cochlea structure and 5 pairs of gel-flexible silicone ear-caps ensure iSound fit comfortably and entirely to your ears, no hurts even for long time use

[One-step Reconnection & One-touch Operation] Just open the charging case and they will automatically connect to your phone (after being paired the first time) and can manage audio playback & calls with the multi-function touch panel and microphone on each earbud effortlessly

[24H Playing Time & Enhanced by PALOVUE iSound APP ] PALOVUE wireless charging case keeps you and your iSound on the go, up to 24 hours of wireless playtime with the compact charging case; PALOVUE iSound APP can set the results of different times of touching the headset according to your preferences, such as increasing or decreasing the volume, answering calls, etc.

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

reviews.title: There is absolutely no bass, highs screeching high and nothing inbetween
reviews.text: These do not fit well and hard to keep in ear. My much cheaper earphones sound much better and much more bass. The treble is very high frequency but that is all you hear with this. Buy name brand and they would have more honest advertisement and better quality. I didn't expect to good bass for in ear earphones but this has non whatsoever and the high frequency could ruin your hearing. Maybe after few hundred hours it will sound better so will let you know. In the mean time pay a little more but get name brand.

reviews.title: Great sound, but a little bulky for an IEM
reviews.text: There are 6 drivers in here-1 DD and 5 BA, but the housings are pretty big. Definitely deep and will probably stick out of your ears, but sound great (with upgraded cable). For what you are paying, these IEMs are a steal. Sound fantastic. Find the the tips that work for you and upgrade the cable (I bought the 2.5 and 3.5 compatible cables from KBEAR and they are fantastic) and you will get as good of a sound as you will find from your source. Add a quality source (I use a Radsone EarStudio) and enjoy high quality sound on a budget.

reviews.title: Fit perfect
reviews.text: Face some reason I was expecting these to be a different material than they were but I’m actually glad with the material that they are and how they fit perfectly on my AirPods.

reviews.title: Yellow
reviews.text: They turned yellow almost immediately

reviews.title: Yellowing?
reviews.text: I’ve had these for less than a month and really love them. Easy to put on and stay put. Today I noticed that one of covers is starting to yellow. I don’t typically keep my headphones anywhere except on my head or in the case, so i have not gotten them dirty to cause this. Anyone else?

reviews.title: Must Buy

reviews.title: Would freely recommend
reviews.text: Item works as described. It’s very slim, barely adds to the bulk of the AirPods Max. I would recommend this product to anyone looking for a bespoke way to protect their investment.

features: [AI NOISE CANCELLATION & MUTE FUNCTION]FXWONTY wireless headset for computer Qualcomm chip QCC3020 equipped with AI environmental noise cancelation microphone, it can eliminate up to 99.99% of the ambient noise. So you can hear and be heard clearly wherever you are. It's perfect for remote work. When you want to mute your voice during the call, just pressing the mute button on the microphone, ensuring that you can easily switch to a private conversation.

[LONG BATTERY LIFE & CONVENIENT CHARGING BASE]The bluetooth headset is equipped with a 400mAh battery that provides up to 50 hours of talk time and 400 hours of standby time.It's perfect for office, home, remote working, call center. Wireless headset for computer designed with a charging base, you can easily drop the headset in it for a charge, the headset can also be charged with the USB-C charging cable directly. It only takes 2 hours to fully charge.

[BLUETOOTH HEADSET WITH USB DONGLE & WIDE COMPATIBILITY]Wireless headset adopts bluetooth 5.0. It will also come with the USB dongle, so you don't need to worry about the compatibility issue any more. For devices without Bluetooth function, you can use our USB dongle to connect.

[COMFORTABLE EARMUFFS & ROTATABLE MICROPHONE]The USB wireless headset with microphone is comfortable to wear, with soft& breathable earmuffs& adjustable headband design to fit different head types. In addition, the rotatable microphone can be used on the right or left. [REMOTE WORKING RANGE & HANDS-FREE CALLS]The bluetooth 5.0 headset for pc has a wireless working range of up to 49 feet/15 meters, even a distance away from the connected device for a short time, call quality will not be affected. reviews.title: Big Lag
reviews.text: I use this headset for working from home, and every phone call is a struggle due to lag. I am constantly talking over people or being talked over by them. It's functional, but not ideal perhaps for phone calls.

reviews.title: Big Upgrade for me!!
reviews.text: These are fantastic!  I had a pair that pooped out in less than a year, I got these with my fingers crossed and so far they are a BIG UPGRADE!!! Voice clarity & noise canceling are great!  I work from home with 2 big dogs, it matters for me.

reviews.title: Very happy
reviews.text: I really like this headset.  I love the charging station as I often woukd forget to charge my last headset that was charged with usb cable.  My only issue with the headset is that the headband is not adjustable and I have a smaller head so the support bar sits a little low.  Very good connection and stays connected if I move around the house.

reviews.title: It Won't Charge
reviews.text: It worked wonderfully for a couple months and now it won't charge. I have switched outlets thinking it was my outlet. I also make sureits lined up in charging base. I loved it until it stopped working. Its a little pricey to only get 2 month use.

reviews.title: Comfortable for truckers and the office.
reviews.text:
I am a dispatcher and I have to wear a headset 8hrs a day. I can stand this one for about 6 hrs. before I need to switch ears. That is better than most headsets I have used. My office orders $300 headsets and this one can throw down with the best of them. The noise cancelation is excellent and the calls sound loud and clear. The Bluetooth connection last the entire 8+ hour shift. Once paired it connects seamlessly when I set up for my day.

Before you spend hundreds of dollars on a headset, give this one a chance. I am glad I did.

I hope this helps. :-)

title: Headset Headphone Hands-Free + Microphone Compatible for Only Avaya 9608 9608g 9620l A1608-i J139 J169 J179 IP VIOP Home Office Work Desktop Telephone
features: ONLY compatible with Avaya 9608 9620 1608 J139 J169 J179. Please make sure compatible before purchase

Superior quality sound with the flexible adjustable noise cancellation microphone.
Most easy setup headset solution, Extra ear and mic cushions.
Shirt clips included. NO Mute / Volume Control built in.

reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

features: 【Reliable Bluetooth 5.3】PALOVUE wireless earbuds with cutting-edge Bluetooth 5.3 innovation provide instant and steady transmission, providing you with a continuous calling and music experience as well as noise cancellation.
【Automatic Pairing】When removed from the charging case, the wireless headphones would be moment-matched and auto-reconnect with the last-matched device.

【Ergonomic Lightweight Design】The ergonomic in-ear design of the headphones fits in each ear and comes with four different types of silicone ear tips to accommodate every ear profile for a pleasant wearing experience. They weigh 4g apiece and can be worn effectively without pressure, while the charging case weighs 28g and can easily fit in your pocket and be hefted around, making it ideal for commuting, working out, and travelling, among other things.

【Clear HD Sound】The Bluetooth codec supports AAC/SBC and is designed with premium speakers, providing you powerful highs and profound bass and allowing you to enjoy superb music. They include two built-in microphones for clear and raucous calls, making them suitable for any scenario, such as webinars and online classes.

【Waterproof Smart Control】Equipped with IPX5 waterproof grade protects the headphones from perspiration during workout. Ideal for cycling, jogging, exercise, skiing, touring, trekking, and other outdoor activities. Also enables dual-ear easy touch volume/music/call/voice assistant control, among other things, and can switch between single and binaural modes at will. Reliable product quality combined with powerful technology and 2-years after-sales service.

reviews.title: They bump!
reviews.text: These are amazing! For the price, they bump, and now canceling for sure! Nice small size not bulky case. Many sizes to fit many people included. I love them already! Functionality of tapping seems really good also. I was able to move them in my ear without interruption of accidental tap. Very pleased.
